◎简　　介  

　　This version of Marvel Rising focuses on Inferno, whose powers get stolen by a criminal named Zayla. The Secret Warriors attemptwww.mke6.comto get Inferno's powers back while Inferno is conflicted as to whether he actually wants his powers back.
